originalTitle: SpaceX is vastly more expensive than any stock in the S&P 500, fueled by ‘FOMO’ mentality
summary: Billions of dollars have flowed into SpaceX ETFs as retail investors look past conventional valuations.
content: Billions of dollars have flowed into SpaceX ETFs as retail investors look past conventional valuations.
chineseTitle: 在“FOMO”心态的推动下，SpaceX 的股价远高于标准普尔 500 指数中的任何股票
chineseSummary: 随着散户投资者超越传统估值，数十亿美元已流入 SpaceX ETF。
chineseContent: 随着散户投资者超越传统估值，数十亿美元已流入 SpaceX ETF。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
